description_long: This is a rectangular, stone-textured cabinet with a robust and heavy appearance, likely constructed from marble or granite. The cabinet features three prominent horizontal drawers, each with a metallic ring handle, visible on the front face. The stone surface is mottled with shades of gray and brown, giving it a natural, earthy look. The sides and top are solid, with no visible openings or handles, emphasizing its monolithic design. The front is the only interactive side, with the drawers and handles clearly defined, while the back and sides are plain and unadorned. The overall build suggests durability and a design suited for outdoor or public urban environments, such as parks or plazas.
description: A heavy, stone-textured cabinet with three front drawers and metallic ring handles, featuring a natural gray and brown mottled finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the solid stone texture and the layered drawer structure without visible handles.
description_view_1: Back view displaying a plain, unadorned stone surface with no handles or openings.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the solid stone texture and drawer outlines.
description_view_3: Front view highlighting three drawers with metallic ring handles and detailed stone paneling.
